name: redis
description: Redis using Bun's native client, backs caching and rate limiting

compose.service:
redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "6379:6379"

readme:
## Redis

`redis` from `src/lib/redis.ts` (Bun's native client, no driver dep). Cache helpers `cacheGet`, `cacheSet`, `cacheDelete` in `src/lib/cache.ts`. Rate limiting uses Redis while this is installed.

Connection string: `REDIS_URL` in `.env`.
